zh.St Michael Penkevil, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Borlase於1482年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾時，他的父親John Borlase40歲，母親Margaret Kingdon33歲。他於1500年與Philippa Treluddra在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.St Michael Penkevil, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Borlase于1482年出生在英国可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾时，他的父亲John Borlase40岁，母亲Margaret Kingdon33岁。他于1500年与Philippa Treluddra在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Borlase
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: locative name from Old French bordelais ‘man from Bordeaux’.

variants.name: Barlas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Sajid, Ali, Humaira, Mohammed, Rehan.  Greek Dimitrios, Spiro, Spiros.

Scottish (Perthshire): habitational name, probably from Barloch, near Milngavie (Stirlings) + post-medieval excrescent -s. The final syllable of Barloch will alternatively have been pronounced -low and -lie in Scots, whence a variety of attested surname forms including Barlow, Barlows, Barlie, Barliss, Barles(s), and Barlas(s), mostly clustering in settlements near Blackruthven in Tibbermore parish (Perthshire), where the surname Barloche is first recorded in 1589.
Greek: probably a nickname derived from parla ‘blabbering’ (from Italian parlare ‘to talk’). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname derived from Aromanian bărliv ‘tormented, long-suffering’.

variants.name: Burles
meanings: 1 English: variant of Burle with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Borlase was born in 1482, in St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England, his father, John Borlase, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Kingdon, was 33. He married Philippa Treluddra in 1500, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Borlase est né en 1482, à St Michael Penkivel, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Borlase, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Kingdon, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Treluddra en 1500, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Borlase 1482 in St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Borlase 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Kingdon 33. Er hat 1500 in England Philippa Treluddra geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Borlase è nato il nel 1482 nel St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, John Borlase, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Kingdon, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Treluddra nel 1500, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Borlaseが1482年にイギリスコルンワルスト ミチャエル ペンキベルで生まれた時，父John Borlaseは40歳，母Margaret Kingdonは33歳であった。1500年にイギリスでPhilippa Treluddraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Borlase(이)가 1482년 영국 코른월 스트 믹하얼 펜키벨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Borlase(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Kingdon(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1500년 영국에서 Philippa Treluddra(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Borlase nasceu em 1482, em St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Borlase, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Kingdon, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Treluddra em 1500, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Borlase родился в 1482 г. в местности ст мачаел пенкивел, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John Borlase было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Kingdon, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Treluddra в 1500 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Borlase nació en 1482, en St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Borlase, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Kingdon, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Philippa Treluddra en 1500, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
